DECLARATION OF JONATHAN D. ROBBINS IN SUPPORT OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT THEREON FILED BY PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. AT THE REQUEST OF THE PARTIES, THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC'S PETITION FOR ORDER TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT THEREON IS CONTINUED TO MAY 22, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC'S PETITION FOR ORDER TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT THEREON IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RICHARD KRAMER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
